metadata.source_note: Derived strictly from A2.8 contracts and base corpus only; no expansion or general MTG semantics.

derived_from.runtime_priority_case: Howling Mine wording must align with runtime cards_index.

focused_unit_validation.label: Focused unit validation
focused_unit_validation.goal: Protect canonical AbilityIR outputs for the base corpus.
focused_unit_validation.required_when: Any change to lowering or AbilityIR contracts.

snapshot_or_gold_validation.label: Snapshot / gold validation
snapshot_or_gold_validation.goal: Detect drift in canonical JSON contracts and expected outputs.
snapshot_or_gold_validation.required_when: Any change to A2.8 contract files or canonical skeletons.

runtime_oracle_validation.label: Runtime oracle validation
runtime_oracle_validation.goal: Ensure wording-sensitive anchors match runtime cards_index.
runtime_oracle_validation.required_when: Any change touching wording-dependent anchors or oracle text sources.
checks: Runtime wording match for Howling Mine
No fallback to synthetic wording when runtime differs

visible_postdeploy_validation.label: Visible postdeploy validation
visible_postdeploy_validation.goal: Prevent visible regressions in coverage, audit, or ordering.
visible_postdeploy_validation.required_when: Any change that could alter visible semantic outputs.

regression_rules.detects: Silent drift in lowering or contract fields
regression_rules.minimum_evidence: Focused unit validation or gold snapshot update
regression_rules.notes: No silent changes to canonical IR.

regression_rules.detects: Mismatch between runtime cards_index and fixtures
regression_rules.minimum_evidence: Runtime oracle validation for affected cards

trigger_conditions_for_postdeploy_valida.trigger: Change alters runtime semantic outputs for base corpus
trigger_conditions_for_postdeploy_valida.rationale: Visible changes must be validated postdeploy.
Runtime oracle wording can drift independently.

trigger_conditions_for_postdeploy_valida.trigger: Pure contract/doc change with no runtime impact
